context: Collateral routes: √  superior mediastinal widening (64%) √  encasement / compression / occlusion of SVC √  dilated cervical + superficial thoracic veins (80%) √  SVC thrombus NUC: √  increased tracer uptake in quadrate lobe + posterior aspect of medial segment of left lobe ← umbilical pathway toward liver when injected in upper extremity
